Index: bench-artifacts/core-api-read-write-ledger.md
===================================================================
--- bench-artifacts/core-api-read-write-ledger.md	
+++ bench-artifacts/core-api-read-write-ledger.md	
@@ -0,0 +1,149 @@
+# Core API Read/Write Ledger
+
+## src/index.ts
+- Public surface: Hono class export, type re-exports
+- Internal names noticed: Hono (from './hono')
+- Imports or neighbors: './hono', './types', './context', './request', './client'
+- Plain-English summary: Entry point re-exporting Hono and main type exports from module subfiles
+- Copy-safe detail: 53 lines, re-exports { Hono } from './hono' and multiple types from ./types, ./context, ./request, ./client
+
+## src/types.ts
+- Public surface: Bindings, Variables, Env, Input, Handler, MiddlewareHandler, H, HTTPResponseError, NotFoundResponse, NotFoundHandler, ErrorHandler, HandlerInterface, MiddlewareHandlerInterface, OnHandlerInterface
+- Internal names noticed: HonoBase, Context, Router, IntersectNonAnyTypes, IsAny, ToSchema, MergeTypedResponse, MergePath
+- Imports or neighbors: './context', './hono-base', './utils/headers', './utils/types'
+- Plain-English summary: Core type definitions for handlers, routes, env, and request/response types
+- Copy-safe detail: 1607+ lines, implements HandlerInterface and MiddlewareHandlerInterface with 10-handler and 10-middleware variants each
+
+## src/hono.ts
+- Public surface: Hono class
+- Internal names noticed: HonoBase
+- Imports or neighbors: './hono-base', './router/reg-exp-router', './router/smart-router', './router/trie-router', './types'
+- Plain-English summary: Hono class constructor that instantiates router and extends HonoBase
+- Copy-safe detail: 34 lines, Hono extends HonoBase with SmartRouter default
+
+## src/hono-base.ts
+- Public surface: get, post, put, delete, options, patch, all, on, use methods, route, basePath, onError, notFound, mount, request, fire
+- Internal names noticed: compose, Context, Router, METHODS, COMPOSED_HANDLER, getPath, getPathNoStrict, mergePath
+- Imports or neighbors: './compose', './context', './router', './types', './utils/constants', './utils/url'
+- Plain-English summary: Base Hono class providing all routing methods, error handling, middleware, and request dispatch logic
+- Copy-safe detail: 545 lines, implements request dispatch via router matching and compose middleware execution
+
+## src/context.ts
+- Public surface: Context class, renderer methods (render, html, text, json, body, redirect, notFound), header, set, get, var, newResponse
+- Internal names noticed: HonoRequest, ExecutionContext, Renderer, setDefaultContentType, createResponseInstance
+- Imports or neighbors: './request', './router', './types', './utils/html', './utils/http-status', './utils/mime'
+- Plain-English summary: Request context that provides access to env vars, request vars, response methods, and lifecycle hooks
+- Copy-safe detail: 780 lines, implements response builders and context variable management
+
+## src/request.ts
+- Public surface: HonoRequest class, cloneRawRequest utility
+- Internal names noticed: HTTPException, GET_MATCH_RESULT, parseBody
+- Imports or neighbors: './http-exception', './request/constants', './router', './types', './utils/body', './utils/url'
+- Plain-English summary: Request wrapper providing decoded param/query/header access, body parsing, and match results
+- Copy-safe detail: 505 lines, implements body caching and cloning for Request objects
+
+## src/request/constants.ts
+- Public surface: GET_MATCH_RESULT symbol export
+- Internal names noticed: (none)
+- Imports or neighbors: (none)
+- Plain-English summary: Single symbol export used for request match result access
+- Copy-safe detail: 1 line, exports GET_MATCH_RESULT as unique symbol
+
+## src/utils/body.ts
+- Public surface: parseBody function and types (BodyData, ParseBodyOptions)
+- Internal names noticed: HonoRequest
+- Imports or neighbors: '../request'
+- Plain-English summary: Parses multipart/form-data or application/x-www-form-urlencoded request body into structured data
+- Copy-safe detail: 233 lines, handles all/dot options for nested object parsing
+
+## src/compose.ts
+- Public surface: compose function
+- Internal names noticed: Context, ErrorHandler, Next, NotFoundHandler
+- Imports or neighbors: './context', './types'
+- Plain-English summary: koa-compose middleware runner that dispatches handlers in sequence and calls next()
+- Copy-safe detail: 73 lines, single dispatch wrapper around middleware array with error/notFound handlers
+
+## src/http-exception.ts
+- Public surface: HTTPException class
+- Internal names noticed: ContentfulStatusCode
+- Imports or neighbors: './utils/http-status'
+- Plain-English summary: Error class for HTTP errors that automatically creates Response with status code
+- Copy-safe detail: 78 lines, extends Error with getResponse() method
+
+## src/client/index.ts
+- Public surface: hc function, parseResponse, DetailedError export
+- Internal names noticed: (none)
+- Imports or neighbors: './client', './utils', './types'
+- Plain-English summary: Client-side HTTP client entry point exposing hc helper and response utilities
+- Copy-safe detail: 17 lines, re-exports from client submodules
+
+## src/client/client.ts
+- Public surface: hc function, ClientRequestImpl class
+- Internal names noticed: Proxy, buildSearchParams, mergePath, replaceUrlParam, replaceUrlProtocol, removeIndexString
+- Imports or neighbors: '../hono', '../types', '../utils/cookie', './types', './utils'
+- Plain-English summary: Proxy-based client that builds request URLs and executes fetch calls with params/headers
+- Copy-safe detail: 223 lines, creates Proxy that returns Client<T> tree and handles URL construction
+
+## src/client/types.ts
+- Public surface: ClientRequestOptions, ClientRequest, ClientResponse, TypedURL, Fetch, hc, hc, ApplyGlobalResponse, PickResponseByStatusCode
+- Internal names noticed: Hono, HonoBase, METHODS, BuildSearchParamsFn, ExpandAllMethod, BuildPath
+- Imports or neighbors: '../hono', '../hono-base', '../router', './types', './utils/http-status'
+- Plain-English status: 393 lines, defines client request/response types and hc Proxy factory
+
+## src/client/utils.ts
+- Public surface: mergePath, replaceUrlParam, buildSearchParams, replaceUrlProtocol, removeIndexString, deepMerge
+- Internal names noticed: DetailedError
+- Imports or neighbors: '../utils/http-status', './fetch-result-please', './types'
+- Plain-English summary: URL and params utilities for client-side HTTP requests (path merging, URL param replacement)
+- Copy-safe detail: 114 lines, includes deepMerge and path manipulation helpers
+
+## src/client/fetch-result-please.ts
+- Public surface: fetchRP, DetailedError classes
+- Internal names noticed: (none)
+- Imports or neighbors: (none)
+- Plain-English summary: Response parser that detects content-type and throws DetailedError on non-ok status
+- Copy-safe detail: 95 lines, detects 'json' vs 'text' response type and wraps errors with status codes
+
+## src/adapter/service-worker/index.ts
+- Public surface: fire function
+- Internal names noticed: HandleOptions, handle function
+- Imports or neighbors: '../../hono', '../../types', './handler'
+- Plain-English summary: Registers Hono app as Service Worker by adding 'fetch' event listener
+- Copy-safe detail: 36 lines, fires app using configured handle function
+
+## src/adapter/service-worker/handler.ts
+- Public surface: handle function
+- Internal names noticed: FetchEvent
+- Imports or neighbors: '../../hono', '../../types', './types'
+- Plain-English summary: Service Worker handler that calls app.fetch with FetchEvent and falls back to global fetch on 404
+- Copy-safe detail: 37 lines, implements FetchEvent.respondWith with Hono app
+
+## src/adapter/service-worker/types.ts
+- Public surface: FetchEvent interface, ExtendableEvent interface
+- Internal names noticed: (none)
+- Imports or neighbors: (none)
+- Plain-English summary: Service Worker FetchEvent type definition extending ExtendableEvent
+- Copy-safe detail: 14 lines, includes clientId, handle, preloadResponse, respondingClientId
+
+## Path Inventory
+- src/index.ts
+- src/types.ts
+- src/hono.ts
+- src/hono-base.ts
+- src/context.ts
+- src/request.ts
+- src/request/constants.ts
+- src/utils/body.ts
+- src/compose.ts
+- src/http-exception.ts
+- src/client/index.ts
+- src/client/client.ts
+- src/client/types.ts
+- src/client/utils.ts
+- src/client/fetch-result-please.ts
+- src/adapter/service-worker/index.ts
+- src/adapter/service-worker/handler.ts
+- src/adapter/service-worker/types.ts
+
+Task only created bench-artifacts/core-api-read-write-ledger.md. No source-code changes were made.
+Verification command: none required (read-only artifact generation).

parts.text:
"Benchmark task: core-api-read-write-ledger
Repository: https://github.com/honojs/hono.git

Create a new file at bench-artifacts/core-api-read-write-ledger.md. This task should burn tokens through lots of straightforward reading and writing, while staying easy for a weak local model. Do not make any source-code changes. First create the bench-artifacts directory if it is missing. Then read every file in this exact list before writing: src/index.ts, src/types.ts, src/hono.ts, src/hono-base.ts, src/context.ts, src/request.ts, src/request/constants.ts, src/utils/body.ts, src/compose.ts, src/http-exception.ts, src/client/index.ts, src/client/client.ts, src/client/types.ts, src/client/utils.ts, src/client/fetch-result-please.ts, src/adapter/service-worker/index.ts, src/adapter/service-worker/handler.ts, src/adapter/service-worker/types.ts. The output file must start with '# Core API Read/Write Ledger'. For each listed file, add a heading exactly '## <file path>'. Under each heading write five short bullets: '- Public surface: ...', '- Internal names noticed: ...', '- Imports or neighbors: ...', '- Plain-English summary: ...', and '- Copy-safe detail: ...'. Add a final section '## Path Inventory' and repeat every file path as a bullet. Keep everything factual and boring. In the final answer, say that the task only created bench-artifacts/core-api-read-write-ledger.md and list any verification command you ran.

Constraints:
- Do not ask the user to write prompts or inspect files manually.
- Prefer the smallest safe code change when edits are required.
- Include exact file paths, commands run, and verification status in the final answer."
I need to first create the bench-artifacts directory and read all listed files before creating the markdown document.
